summary: Fully reintegrated the merged Onyx scanner/randomizer chatbot as the embedded profile-page Onyx engine while preserving a static browser-only/no-backend site.
behaviorChanges: Onyx embedded widget now loads the full generated response-bank bundle from the merged chatbot source.
Added OnyxRobustBrain wrapper that routes by profile, topic category, mood, DBT skill intent, and safety language.
DBT requests force advising_professor mood before food/body words can steal the emote.
Food/hungry emote triggers only for actual food/body/store contexts, not DBT questions that mention hunger.
Petting/how-are-you/Onyx-food questions now route to personality-core responses instead of generic support fallbacks.
Generated-bank artifacts such as unique paw-print markers and underscore source labels are stripped from displayed replies.
The huge knowledge JSON remains in json/onyx/full_chatbot and window globals, while recursive scanner registration stays lightweight to avoid freezing static pages.
Onyx status badges now show full-bank replies plus scanner entries when loaded.
notes: Font binary files were removed from the returned package; CSS/browser fallback fonts remain.
